calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Trust
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE FIRST ACCOUNT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE FIRST ACCOUNT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Reset To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun for Petitioner.

Mr. Kun stated that he has the petition to terminate the Special Needs Trust and the petition to terminate the Conservatorship (case number 291120). The matter was continued to February 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Getz.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE FIRST ACCOUNT
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Reset To Feb-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun for Allen Howell.

Mr. Kun requested a two week continuance. The Court stated that a petition to terminate the Special Needs Trust and a petition to terminate the Conservatorship was needed. The matter was continued to February 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE FIRST ACCOUNT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Reset To Jan-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The First Account
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney and the Trustee to appear and show cause as to why the First Account has not been filed. The return date is December 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: J. Chien.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The First Account
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Continued To Nov-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun for Allan Howell.

Mr. Kun stated that Mr. Howell was not present due to a medical procedure and requested a continuance stating that they were under the assumption that this accounting was waived as they had transferred all of the funds from the Conservatorship to the Trust. The Court proposed Mr. Kun file an ex parte declaration requesting a waiver of account and set a hearing date 60 days out for filing of the First Account in the event that the ex parte request is denied. The matter was continued to November 22, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The First Account
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Continued To Sep-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A Citation will be issued to the Trustee to appear and show cause why his/her powers should not be supsended or why he/she should not be punished for contempt for failure to file the First Account. The return date is September 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The First Account
